title: Peanutmons
description: A cobblemon addon adding the leaked peanut pokemon!
body:
An addon for the cobblemon mod adding the two leaked peanut pokemon! 

Weenut is a rare pokemon found in any forest biomes, and aren't very powerful by themselves, but after being exposed to a sun stone, will evolve into the powerful Legallus!

This was a fun little side project I took on between working on bigger projects! This is my second cobblemon addon, and if you'd like to stay updated on my other projects you can join my discord! Thank you!
